decisions.decision: Strict from config — applyForLoan takes loanProductId, rate/method/limits enforced from LoanProductConfig
decisions.rationale: Single source of truth; prevents rate inconsistency

decisions.decision: Monthly accrual on live outstanding balance via batch job
decisions.rationale: Reflects actual balance after repayments; industry standard; IFRS compliant

decisions.decision: Full audit log — new LoanInterestHistory entity
decisions.rationale: Complete audit trail for compliance and dispute resolution

decisions.decision: Direct dependency — sacco-loan depends on sacco-config
decisions.rationale: Simpler than event-driven; acceptable in modular monolith

decisions.decision: Keep original repayment schedule; track actual interest separately
decisions.rationale: Schedule serves as amortization plan; actual tracked in LoanInterestHistory

decisions.decision: Both totalInterestAccrued and totalInterestPaid as separate BigDecimal fields on LoanApplication
decisions.rationale: Enables accrued-vs-paid gap tracking (arrears); essential for accounting reconciliation

decisions.decision: Breaking change — replace interestRate/interestMethod with loanProductId on LoanApplicationRequest
decisions.rationale: Pre-production system; clean API surface; no backward-compat burden

decisions.decision: Interest-first: overdue interest → current interest → principal
decisions.rationale: Standard SACCO practice per SASRA/UN SACCO loan agreements

decisions.decision: Accrual basis — monthly DR Interest Receivable / CR Interest Income; on repayment DR Cash / CR Interest Receivable / CR Loan Receivable
Monthly interest summary across all loans: accrued, received, arrears

constraints: LoanProductConfig must exist and be active before loan application
Monthly accrual runs inside existing LoanBatchServiceImpl cron
BigDecimal scale 6 intermediate / scale 2 final / HALF_UP rounding
interestMethod migrates from String to InterestMethod enum
Interest Receivable account (1003) must be seeded in ledger
